description: Curated chart-composition recipes. Strategist binds every visual in Design Spec §5 to one of these. v0.4 adds 35 new recipes (2 structural + 8 high + 11 medium + 14 low) for a total of 62 recipes, plus tier and category fields mapped to the 9 FT Visual Vocabulary relationships.

recipes.title: KPI Banner Card
recipes.composition: single metric + delta + spark/icon
anti_use: When you need to show distribution
When comparison across categories matters more than headline number

recipes.title: Categorical Comparison (Bar)
recipes.composition: one categorical axis + one value axis; optional secondary series (clustered)

recipes.title: Time-Series Trend (Line)
recipes.composition: continuous time axis + 1-3 value series + reference line

recipes.title: Year-over-Year Variance
recipes.composition: current-year series + prior-year series (clustered) + variance callout
anti_use: Single data point (use card with delta)

recipes.title: Waterfall Bridge
recipes.composition: start value → category increments/decrements → end value

recipes.title: Funnel / Conversion
recipes.composition: ordered stages + monotonic non-increasing values + conversion labels

recipes.title: Matrix Scorecard
recipes.composition: entity rows × (actual / plan / var% / status / trend) columns + grand total

recipes.title: Small Multiples Trend
recipes.composition: one panel per category; shared axes; single line color

recipes.title: Map (Geographic)
recipes.composition: region fill by magnitude OR point overlay with size / color
anti_use: Ranking is the real story (use bar)

recipes.title: Decomposition Tree
recipes.composition: root measure → user-chosen dimension drills → AI splits

recipes.title: Scatter Quadrant
recipes.composition: X measure × Y measure × entity dim; median reference lines form quadrants

recipes.title: Gauge vs Target
recipes.composition: single value + target + min/max arc

recipes.title: Tornado (Sensitivity / Diverging)
recipes.composition: two groups mirror-imaged around zero; sorted by absolute magnitude
use_when: A/B group comparison across many factors

recipes.title: 100% Stacked Bar (Share / Mix)
recipes.composition: per-entity rows summing to 100% split across ≤5 part segments
use_when: Part-to-whole when absolute scale is secondary

recipes.title: Ribbon Chart (Rank-over-Time)
recipes.composition: stacked columns per period with curved ribbons re-ordering by rank between periods

recipes.title: Bullet Chart (IBCS Actual vs Target)
recipes.visual_type: BulletChart (custom) OR clusteredBar with reference lines
recipes.composition: monochrome range bands + actual bar + target tick, 4-6 bullets stacked
use_when: KPI tile replacement when target context matters
anti_use: Range bands coloured as traffic lights

recipes.title: Calendar Heatmap (Daily Pattern)
recipes.visual_type: matrix with conditional background OR Calendar custom visual
recipes.composition: day-of-week rows × week columns, tile coloured by metric intensity
anti_use: Unsigned scale for signed metrics (use diverging)

recipes.title: Pareto 80/20 (ABC Analysis)
recipes.composition: columns sorted DESC + cumulative % line on secondary axis + 80% reference line
use_when: ABC analysis of SKUs / customers / accounts

recipes.title: Dumbbell (Before vs After)
recipes.visual_type: Dumbbell Bar Chart (custom) OR scatter+line composition
recipes.composition: two endpoints per row joined by a connector; rows sorted by absolute change

recipes.title: Histogram (Distribution Shape)
recipes.visual_type: columnChart with pre-bucketed bins OR histogram custom visual
recipes.composition: equal-width bins on X, count on Y, optional mean/median reference lines

recipes.title: Slope Chart (Two-Point Rank Change)
recipes.visual_type: lineChart with two category positions OR custom visual
recipes.composition: two vertical tick columns, one dot per category per side, slope line between
use_when: Two-snapshot comparison with a clear narrative

recipes.title: Sparkline Table (Row-wise Micro-trends)
recipes.visual_type: tableEx / matrix with inline sparkline column OR table + custom Sparkline visual
recipes.composition: rows × (category + value + delta + per-row sparkline); per-row min/max scaling
use_when: Tabular view that still needs shape-over-time
Watchlist where shape matters more than absolute level
anti_use: Shared global Y scale across sparklines
Colouring every delta (defeats the attention filter)

recipes.title: Box Plot (Quartile Distribution)
recipes.visual_type: custom Box and Whisker visual OR composed stacked-bar with whiskers
recipes.composition: whiskers + IQR box + median line + outlier dots, one glyph per category
use_when: Spread / skew / outlier story matters as much as central tendency

recipes.title: Sankey Flow (Stage-to-Stage Attribution)
recipes.composition: left→right node columns connected by thickness-weighted ribbons
use_when: Budget / cost flow across cost centres

recipes.title: Treemap (Hierarchical Share)
recipes.composition: nested rectangles, area = primary measure, colour saturation = secondary measure
use_when: Top-N dominance plus long-tail visible in one glance
anti_use: Flat share with no dominant tile (bar chart reads better)
Binding colour to category (destroys magnitude encoding)

recipes.title: Combo Chart (Bar + Line, Dual Axis)
recipes.composition: columns on left axis (volume) + line on right axis (rate / ratio) sharing the X dimension
use_when: Spend + efficiency ratio for finance reviews
anti_use: Two volume measures (use stacked column instead)
More than one series on the right axis
Omitting the left/right axis annotations in the legend

recipes.title: Control Chart (SPC — UCL / LCL / Mean)
recipes.visual_type: lineChart with reference lines OR custom Control Chart / xViz SPC
recipes.composition: time-ordered series + mean line + UCL/LCL (±3σ) reference lines + flagged out-of-control markers
use_when: Process / quality monitoring with a stable sampling cadence
Ops dashboards for defect rate / latency / throughput
anti_use: Hiding the limits to 'clean up' the chart
Recomputing limits on every filter change (they must be a frozen baseline)

recipes.title: Deneb Custom Chart (Vega-Lite base)
recipes.composition: Vega-Lite spec embedded in Deneb custom visual; shared scaffold for all Deneb sibling recipes
use_when: No built-in or registered custom visual matches
Interactive behavior beyond built-in capability is needed
Team already pays the Deneb registration cost
anti_use: Built-in or registered custom visual would do
Hard-coded hex colors instead of theme tokens

recipes.title: Stacked Bar (Absolute Values)
recipes.composition: per-entity stacked bars with absolute segment values and total labels
use_when: Total magnitude AND mix both matter

recipes.title: Multi-Row Card
recipes.composition: 4-8 metrics stacked vertically at equal weight with label + value

recipes.title: KPI Indicator (Built-in KPI Visual)
recipes.composition: single value + goal + trend axis + status indicator (good/bad color)
use_when: Status vs target with trend context

recipes.title: Detail Table
recipes.composition: flat table with 5-10 columns, right-aligned numbers, conditional formatting, totals row
use_when: Operational watchlists with status per row

recipes.title: Key Influencers (AI)
recipes.composition: target measure + ranked driver bars with relative strength + optional segments pane

recipes.title: Smart Narrative
recipes.visual_type: narrativeVisual OR textbox with dynamic values
recipes.composition: auto-generated or authored narrative paragraph with inline dynamic measure tokens
use_when: Paired context for a headline chart
anti_use: Sole visual on a page (needs chart anchor)

recipes.title: Q&A Visual
recipes.composition: natural-language query box + 3-5 suggested prompts + auto-rendered result visual
use_when: Landing page with curated starter prompts

recipes.title: Area Chart (Single Series)
recipes.composition: single-series filled line over continuous time axis with zero baseline
use_when: Volume under the curve is meaningful
anti_use: Change / slope is the story (use trend-line)

recipes.title: Lollipop Chart
recipes.visual_type: clusteredBarChart with narrow bars + markers OR Deneb lollipop
recipes.composition: thin bar per category + emphasized endpoint marker optionally sized by secondary measure
use_when: Ranking with visual focus on the tip

recipes.title: Diverging Likert Scale
recipes.composition: per-question horizontal bars centered at neutral; positive extends right, negative left
anti_use: Neutral included in stack (destroys center anchor)
Raw counts when response rates vary

recipes.title: Surplus / Deficit Area
recipes.composition: single signed measure over time with positive region in good color and negative region in bad color
use_when: Any signed metric anchored at zero

recipes.title: Connected Scatter (Play Axis)
recipes.visual_type: scatterChart with playAxis or Play Axis custom visual
recipes.composition: X/Y scatter with path connecting an entity's positions over time; optional play animation

recipes.title: XY Heatmap
recipes.composition: two discrete dimensions cross-tabulated with color intensity encoding a measure

recipes.title: Sunburst (Hierarchical Rings)
recipes.composition: concentric rings, one per hierarchy level, arc length proportional to measure

recipes.title: Waffle Chart
recipes.composition: 10×10 grid of 100 squares colored by category share (1 square = 1%)

recipes.title: Mekko / Marimekko Chart
recipes.composition: stacked columns where width = second measure (market size) and height = composition share

recipes.title: Radar / Spider Chart
recipes.composition: 5-10 radial axes with polygon per entity; multiple entities overlaid for comparison

recipes.title: Chord Diagram
recipes.composition: circular node arcs with curved ribbons for bidirectional flows between pairs

recipes.title: Gantt Timeline
recipes.composition: horizontal task bars along a date axis with milestones, progress, and today line
anti_use: Color-coding by both phase AND resource simultaneously

recipes.title: Population Pyramid
recipes.visual_type: clusteredBarChart split by sign OR TornadoChart1452517688218
recipes.composition: back-to-back horizontal bars with ordinal Y axis (age bands); one group per side
use_when: HR headcount by age band × gender

recipes.title: Dot Plot (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: single dot per category on a shared numeric axis
use_when: Precise magnitude read without bar weight

recipes.title: Dot Strip Plot (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: one dot per observation along a numeric strip grouped by category
use_when: Distribution preview without full density estimate
anti_use: Summary stats are the story (use box-plot-distribution)

recipes.title: Barcode Plot (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: all observations as thin vertical ticks on a numeric axis; optional highlight
use_when: Highlight a single value vs the population

recipes.title: Bump Chart (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: rank position on Y, time on X, one line per entity crossing when ranks swap

recipes.title: Streamgraph (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: stacked area centered on a symmetrical axis showing proportional change over time

recipes.title: Candlestick (OHLC) (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: per-period OHLC glyph with body (open→close) and wick (high-low); polarity colored

recipes.title: Fan Chart / Projection (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: central trend line flanked by widening CI bands showing growing uncertainty
anti_use: Symmetric CI when measure has natural floor

recipes.title: Voronoi Share (Deneb sibling)
recipes.composition: space-filling tessellation where each cell area ∝ category measure
use_when: Alternative to treemap for varied aesthetics

recipes.title: Violin Plot
recipes.composition: kernel density curve mirrored around the median line per category

recipes.title: Network Graph
recipes.composition: nodes + edges with force-directed layout for relational exploration

recipes.title: Parallel Coordinates
recipes.composition: multiple vertical axes with one polyline per entity crossing all axes

recipes.title: Word Cloud
recipes.composition: words sized by frequency / weight with limited rotation

recipes.title: Zebra BI Variance
recipes.composition: IBCS-compliant AC / PY / PL / FC variance rows with standardized notation
anti_use: Mixed with non-IBCS charts on same page

recipes.title: Advance Card (Rich KPI)
recipes.composition: card with value + delta + status + icon zones and conditional formatting per zone
